messages.content: # Have a controller but it does not work in-game? Follow this guide!

-# If you have a PS4/5 controller, go to (https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322225805333626981) first.
-# If you have a Xbox controller and this guide does not fix it, follow (https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322252361581854761)

# Method 1
## Step 1
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > Input Method: Gamepad > Main
## Step 2
> **IF YOU ARE** using a Playstation 4 or 5 gamepad, tick the box.

-# Any binds that say Preset can ***NOT*** be changed.
-# If you want settings, check out https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1189409395226984518
-# For assists and presets head to **gamepad fx** in CSP settings

# Method 2
## Step 1
> Head into any race, online or solo
## Step 2
> Go to the right hand side of the screen with the apps
## Step 3
> Go to the 4 square icon that says** "all apps"** click on that
## Step 4
> In the filter search for** "App Shelf"**
## Step 5
> In App Shelf, find “Extended Controls” and install it
## Step 6
> Open the Extended Controls app and click into any bind you want to change and click the button you want to replace it with. Hit replace old and now you can change the binds you want
